_doc: Crowd-signal source registry for Sqwod Verified. Drives automation/verified.mjs, which upserts the Trustpilot chip (and refreshes its score) into each review's `crowd.sources` daily. TrustScores below are real, public Trustpilot figures captured on `asOf`; with TRUSTPILOT_API_KEY set the refresher overwrites them with the live Business-API value on each run. Apple Watch is intentionally omitted — Apple's corporate Trustpilot page is not representative of the Watch. Editorial scores (sqwodScore, assessment) are NEVER touched by automation.
